channel.title: CS-212 Data Analysis & Responsible AI :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: CS-212 — Data Analysis & Responsible AI 1 credit Working description Notebook-based data analysis as the CULMINATION of the STAT-101 statistics foundation and the data-visualization throughline (B2/B4/B5/B7) — integrative, not new-from-scratch. Honest visualization and data ethics. The genuinely new skill: high-stakes verification and critique of AI-generated code for correctness and security (AI bounded-practice final pass; prerequisite for the Year 3–4 Agentic AI specialization, which this course precedes but does not duplicate).
